diplomat.label: The Diplomat
diplomat.notes: Court voice and faction broker — persuasion, etiquette, and political leverage over raw violence.

enforcer.label: The Enforcer
enforcer.notes: Violence as profession — intimidation, brawling, and disciplines that end fights fast.

predator.label: The Predator
predator.notes: Hunter and territory reader — stealth, survival, animal bonds, and feral disciplines.

criminal.label: The Criminal
criminal.notes: Street economy operator — larceny, streetwise networks, and staying unseen when deals go bad.

shadow.label: The Shadow
shadow.notes: Covert operator — stealth, subterfuge, obfuscate, and intelligence gathering without a trace.

scholar.label: The Scholar
scholar.notes: Knowledge worker — academics, occult theory, investigation, and measured mental attributes.

manipulator.label: The Manipulator
manipulator.notes: Behind-the-throne schemer — subterfuge, dominate, and reading motives before anyone speaks.

duelist.label: The Duelist
duelist.notes: Trained combatant — melee, athletics, celerity, and winning fights that become public spectacle.

occultist.label: The Occultist
occultist.notes: Blood sorcerer and ritual worker — occult lore, thaumaturgy, and forbidden texts as tools.

investigator.label: The Investigator
investigator.notes: Case solver — investigation, insight, awareness, and auspex to reconstruct what happened.

artist.label: The Artist
artist.notes: Public creative — performance, presence, fame, and turning attention into leverage.

alchemist.label: The Alchemist
alchemist.notes: Thin-blood innovator — science, craft, thin-blood alchemy formulas, and improvised miracles.
